component.name: ZipFX
component.summary: Multi-format archive manager for power users

description.p: ZipFX is a cross-platform GUI archive manager built with Qt6. It supports a wide range of archive formats through multiple backends including libzip, libarchive, Bit7z, and native engines for game archives and disk images.
Features include hierarchical and flat file tree browsing, recursive folder add, in-place ZIP modification, drag and drop, CLI mode, file preview, and archive integrity testing.
